name: Senso-ji (Asakusa)
en: Tokyo's oldest temple, Nakamise street & Kaminarimon gate.

name: Meiji Jingu
en: Forest shrine beside Harajuku, calm amid the city.
de: Waldschrein neben Harajuku, Ruhe mitten in der Stadt.

name: Shibuya Crossing
en: The famous scramble crossing and Hachiko statue.
de: Die berühmte Kreuzung und die Hachiko-Statue.

name: teamLab Planets
en: Immersive digital-art museum in Toyosu (book ahead).

name: Tokyo Skytree
en: 634 m tower with sweeping views over the Kanto plain.
de: 634-m-Turm mit weitem Blick über die Kanto-Ebene.

name: Tsukiji Outer Market
en: Street-food stalls: tamago, uni, fresh sushi.

name: Fushimi Inari Taisha
en: Thousands of vermilion torii up the mountain.
de: Tausende zinnoberrote Torii den Berg hinauf.

name: Kinkaku-ji (Golden Pavilion)
en: Gold-leaf pavilion mirrored in its pond.
de: Mit Blattgold belegter Pavillon, gespiegelt im Teich.

name: Arashiyama Bamboo Grove
en: Towering bamboo path; go early to beat crowds.
de: Hoher Bambuspfad; früh kommen wegen der Menge.

name: Kiyomizu-dera
en: Hillside temple with a huge wooden veranda.

name: Gion
en: Historic geisha district of wooden machiya.

name: Nijo Castle
en: Shogun's castle with 'nightingale' floors.

name: Osaka Castle
en: Landmark castle set in a large park.

name: Dotonbori
en: Neon canal-side street; takoyaki & okonomiyaki.

name: Shinsekai & Tsutenkaku
en: Retro district famous for kushikatsu.

name: Universal Studios Japan
en: Theme park incl. Super Nintendo World.

name: Nara Park (deer)
en: Free-roaming bowing deer in a wide park.
de: Frei laufende, sich verbeugende Rehe im Park.

name: Todai-ji
en: Great Buddha Hall — vast bronze Daibutsu.
de: Halle des Großen Buddha — riesiger Bronze-Daibutsu.

name: Peace Memorial Park
en: A-Bomb Dome, museum & cenotaph.

name: Itsukushima Shrine (Miyajima)
en: Floating torii on a sacred island.

name: Owakudani (Hakone)
en: Volcanic valley, ropeway & black eggs.

name: Hakone Shrine / Lake Ashi
en: Lakeside torii with Mt. Fuji views on clear days.
de: Torii am See mit Fuji-Blick bei klarem Wetter.

name: Toshogu Shrine (Nikko)
en: Ornate shrine in cedar forest, a UNESCO site.

name: Kenroku-en
en: One of Japan's three great landscape gardens.
de: Einer der drei großen Landschaftsgärten Japans.

name: Higashi Chaya District
en: Preserved teahouse streets & gold-leaf shops.

name: Takayama Old Town
en: Edo-era merchant streets in the Hida mountains.
de: Kaufmannsgassen der Edo-Zeit in den Hida-Bergen.

name: Okunoin (Koyasan)
en: Vast forest cemetery & pilgrimage site.

name: Chureito Pagoda
en: Iconic pagoda-and-Mt-Fuji viewpoint.
de: Ikonischer Blick auf Pagode und Fuji.

name: Lake Kawaguchiko
en: Classic Mt. Fuji reflections and onsen.

name: Dazaifu Tenmangu
en: Shrine of learning; famed plum blossoms.

name: Otaru Canal
en: Gas-lit canal, glassware & fresh seafood.
